version_description: If you sing the melody these chords just sound much better than the other versions up here.

versions.version_description: This Version is a little bit different from the others because this one is very simple because This version only contain 4 chords with similar position. If anyone don't know the chords, It is recommended to watch:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ix0A3ps_vgg. Enjoy.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Feeling Good Like I Should[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Went And Took A Walk Around The Neighborhood[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Feeling Blessed, never Stressed[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Got That Sunshine On My Sunday Best[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch]
every day can be a better day despite the challenge[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]
All you gotta do is leave it better than you found it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]D7[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G/B[/ch]
It's gonna get difficult to stand but hold your balance[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]D7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]
I just say whatever 'cause there is no way around it[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]
Everyone falls down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G/B[/ch]
But you just gotta know it'll all be fine[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
It's ok, uh-huh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
It's ok, It's ok[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
Feeling good like I should[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]
Went and took a walk around the neighborhood[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
Felling blessed never stressed[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
Got that sunshine on my sunday best[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]D7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G/B[/ch]
somedays you wake up and nothing works you feel surrounded[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]G/B[/ch]
Gotta give your feet some gravity to keep you grounded[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G/B[/ch]
Keep good things inside your ears just like the waves and sound did[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]D7[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G/B[/ch]
And just say whatever 'cause there is no way around it[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
Everyone falls down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]
But you just gotta know it'll all be fine[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
It's ok, uh-huh[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch]
It's ok, it's ok[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]

Went and took a walk around the neighborhood[/tab]
